basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Bhilai. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per GOI norms/outstanding candidates/candidates with relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches with GATE, M.E./M.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches with relevant specialization and GATE
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches from a recognized institute/university with first class, 60% marks or equivalent (55% for SC/ST) and GATE qualification. M.E./M.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches with specialization relevant to the project from a recognized institute/university with first class, 60% marks or equivalent (55% for SC/ST) and GATE qualification.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches from a recognized institute/university with first class, 60% marks or equivalent (55% for SC/ST) and GATE qualification. M.E./M.Tech. in ECE/EE and allied branches with specialization relevant to the project from a recognized institute/university with first class, 60% marks or equivalent (55% for SC/ST) and GATE qualification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per GOI norms/outstanding candidates/candidates with relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Bhilai is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. degree in ECE/EE or allied branches, along with GATE qualification and a first-class academic record.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, plus an additional 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Bhilai.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is via email. Candidates are required to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Bhilai offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per Government of India norms for SC/ST candidates and also for outstanding candidates or those with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
